title: Phase 5: Group chat / channel fan-out
description:
Multi-party group messaging. Relay fans out each message to all group members. E2E encryption via MLS group state.

Required relay-side:
- Channel membership table: channels(id, name, created_by), memberships(channel_id, pub_id, joined_at)
- GroupSend relay message: relay fan-out to all online members, queue for offline members
- O(N) deliver_live() calls per GroupSend — acceptable up to ~1000 members
- For larger groups: consider pub/sub (NATS, Redis) as message bus between relay instances

Required client-side:
- MLS group state management: add/remove members, epoch tracking
- CLI: nie group create <name>, nie group add <contact>, nie group chat <name>
- Group key packages exchanged via relay (not out-of-band)

Depends on: MLS Phase 1 two-party foundation.
